title: Keyword → tag rules
description: When any pattern matches a paper's title or abstract (case-insensitive substring), the tag is auto-suggested.

tag.description: The tag string written into the paper's tags array.

patterns.description: Substrings (case-insensitive) that, if found in title or abstract, trigger the tag.

caseSensitive.description: Default false. Set true for tags that depend on letter case (e.g., 'Al' vs 'al').
